title: Skill library & character setup
emptyList: No skills yet — create one below.
nameHintCreating: Lowercase letters / digits / hyphens. Used as the folder name after creation and can't be changed.
nameHintFixed: The ID is fixed once created.
descLabel: Description (the model uses this to decide when to use it)
descPlaceholder: Use when the user wants a tarot reading / guidance…
bodyPlaceholder:
# Tarot reading
Drawing cards, spreads, interpretation tone…
manualOnlyHint: When checked, it isn't added to the system prompt and can only be invoked explicitly with /skill:{{name}}.
toolsHint: When checked, characters who have this skill get these abilities on demand during chat (still subject to tool review).
assignHint: When checked, this character brings the skill into their chats (other characters can't see it).
introBody: A skill is a piece of "methodology" describing how a character should act in a specific scenario (e.g. tarot, dream interpretation, writing poetry). You can assign the same skill to multiple characters; characters it isn't assigned to won't use it or even see it.

validation.tooLong: The skill ID can't exceed 64 characters.
validation.dashEnds: The skill ID can't start or end with a hyphen.
validation.doubleDash: The skill ID can't contain consecutive hyphens.
validation.charset: The skill ID can only use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
validation.duplicate: A skill with this name already exists.

web.search.label: Web search
web.search.hint: Let the character look things up with a search engine

web.fetch.label: Fetch web page
web.fetch.hint: Read the body content of a given web page

browser.view.label: Open web page
browser.view.hint: Show the page in the browser panel on the right

memory.write.label: Write memory
memory.write.hint: Save long-term memory the user has approved

sectionHint: Check the skills {{name}} will use; skills themselves are added/edited in the "Skills" panel at the bottom left.
sectionEmpty: No skills yet. Create one in the "Skills" panel at the bottom left.
